questions.text: What is the primary difference between an LLM and an AI agent?
options: An LLM is faster than an AI agent
An AI agent wraps an LLM with perception, reasoning, and action capabilities
An LLM can use tools but an AI agent cannot
AI agents only work with text, LLMs can work with images

questions.text: Which of the following correctly lists the three core components of an AI agent?
An AI agent runs in a loop until its goal is achieved.
How many hours per week does a Digital FTE operate?
In the Agent Factory architecture, what does the General Agent do?
options: It trains new LLM models from scratch
It reads a specification document and creates a Custom Agent
It manages database connections for all agents
It handles user authentication and authorization
